Re_250k.description: Low-Re case: attached boundary layer transitions, moderate leeward separation

Re_400k.description: Mid-Re case: intermediate between low-Re and high-Re

Re_650k.description: High-Re case: fully turbulent, massive leeward separation, thinner boundary layer

known_rans_failures.SST_45deg: Menter SST erroneously predicts asymmetric wakes at 45° yaw across all Reynolds numbers and grid densities
known_rans_failures.SA_separation: SA miscalculates separation onset location and volumetric extent of leeward separation bubble
known_rans_failures.boussinesq_breakdown: Both SA and SST fail to capture 3D non-equilibrium turbulent boundary layer effects due to inherent limitations of the Boussinesq (linear eddy-viscosity) approximation in regions of strong streamline curvature and pressure-gradient sign reversals

references.authors: Lowe, K.T., Simpson, R.L., Schetz, J.A., et al.
references.title: Experimental Design for the BeVERLI Hill Flow Separation Experiment

references.authors: Rahmani, S., Lowe, K.T., Simpson, R.L., et al.
references.title: Turbulence Measurements on the BeVERLI Hill

references.authors: Lakebrink, M.T., Mani, M., Rumsey, C.L.
references.title: CFD Predictions for the BeVERLI Hill
